message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[{\"device_id\": \"DEV_A\", \"ward\": \"ER-1\", \"patient_id\": \"PA1\", \"metrics\": {\"heart_rate\": 40, \"temperature\": 36.0}, \"timestamp\": 1620000000, \"status\": \"active\"}, {\"device_id\": \"BACKUP_A\", \"ward\": \"ER-1\", \"patient_id\": \"PA1\", \"metrics\": {\"heart_rate\": 90}, \"timestamp\": 1620000000, \"status\": \"active\"}, {\"device_id\": \"DEV_X\", \"ward\": \"ER-1\", \"patient_id\": \"PA2\", \"metrics\": {\"heart_rate\": 39}, \"timestamp\": 1620000001, \"status\": \"active\"}]","{\"device_roles\": {\"BACKUP_A\": \"backup\"}, \"device_metrics\": {\"BACKUP_A\": [\"heart_rate\"]}, \"ward_requirements\": {}}","{\"heart_rate\": [40, 100], \"temperature\": [36.0, 38.0]}"],"focus":"device_not_in_config_defaults_to_primary; boundary values exactly at min/max; out_of_range detection for slightly below min"},{"input_lines":["[{\"device_id\": \"P1\", \"ward\": \"Ward-B\", \"patient_id\": \"PB1\", \"metrics\": {\"oxygen_saturation\": 85}, \"timestamp\": 1620001000, \"status\": \"active\"}, {\"device_id\": \"B1\", \"ward\": \"Ward-B\", \"patient_id\": \"PB1\", \"metrics\": {\"oxygen_saturation\": 95}, \"timestamp\": 1620001000, \"status\": \"offline\"}, {\"device_id\": \"B2\", \"ward\": \"Ward-B\", \"patient_id\": \"PB1\", \"metrics\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1620001000, \"status\": \"active\"}, {\"device_id\": \"P2\", \"ward\": \"Ward-B\", \"patient_id\": \"PB2\", \"metrics\": {\"respiratory_rate\": 18}, \"timestamp\": 1620001000, \"status\": \"active\"}]","{\"device_roles\": {\"P1\": \"primary\", \"B1\": \"backup\", \"B2\": \"backup\", \"P2\": \"primary\"}, \"device_metrics\": {\"P1\": [\"oxygen_saturation\"], \"B1\": [\"oxygen_saturation\"], \"B2\": [\"oxygen_saturation\"], \"P2\": [\"respiratory_rate\"]}, \"ward_requirements\": {\"Ward-B\": 2}}","{\"oxygen_saturation\": [90, 100], \"respiratory_rate\": [12, 20]}"],"focus":"multiple_backups where primary is out_of_range, one backup offline, another backup provides no data -> backup selection and critical ward detection when working devices < requirement"},{"input_lines":["[]","{\"device_roles\": {\"D1\": \"primary\"}, \"device_metrics\": {\"D1\": [\"temperature\"]}, \"ward_requirements\": {\"ICU-Z\": 1}}","{\"temperature\": [35.0, 42.0]}"],"focus":"empty_device_readings -> should return empty structures except timestamp (tests handling of empty input)"}]}
